channel.title: 音楽ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 音楽ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: Israeli rapper and singer Noga Erez and her partner Ori Rous…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
Israeli rapper and singer Noga Erez and her partner Ori Rousso on the documentary ‘Noga,’ the pressures of war and backlash, and the personal cost of staying visible as Israeli artists.

Read: www.rollingstone.com/music/music-...
item.content:encoded:
Israeli rapper and singer Noga Erez and her partner Ori Rousso on the documentary ‘Noga,’ the pressures of war and backlash, and the personal cost of staying visible as Israeli artists.

Read: www.rollingstone.com/music/music-...

item.title: Goth rock’s roots weren’t entirely gloomy. Meet the early-’8…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: Goth rock’s roots weren’t entirely gloomy. Meet the early-’80s punks who traded nihilism for mysticism, optimism, and a darker path toward personal growth.
item.content:encoded: Goth rock’s roots weren’t entirely gloomy. Meet the early-’80s punks who traded nihilism for mysticism, optimism, and a darker path toward personal growth.

item.title: For the sixth World Cup in a row, no team from the Asian Foo…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: For the sixth World Cup in a row, no team from the Asian Football Confederation made it past the first knockout round, winning only three games out of 29. Asian teams are competitive — up to a point. n.pr/4aUIZBE
item.content:encoded: For the sixth World Cup in a row, no team from the Asian Football Confederation made it past the first knockout round, winning only three games out of 29. Asian teams are competitive — up to a point. n.pr/4aUIZBE

item.title: Timothy Busfield told an Albuquerque grand jury that he can …
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
Timothy Busfield told an Albuquerque grand jury that he can no longer find work because he’s supposedly been “canceled” after being indicted on child sex offenses.

Details ↓
item.content:encoded:
Timothy Busfield told an Albuquerque grand jury that he can no longer find work because he’s supposedly been “canceled” after being indicted on child sex offenses.

Details ↓

item.title: Introducing two new features, now available on Bandcamp: htt…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: Introducing two new features, now available on Bandcamp: https://blog.bandcamp.com/2026/07/16/discover-improvements-and-subsonic-implementation/?utm_campaign=organic_social&utm_content=&utm_medium=social&utm_source=bluesky&utm_term=bandcamp
item.content:encoded: Introducing two new features, now available on Bandcamp: https://blog.bandcamp.com/2026/07/16/discover-improvements-and-subsonic-implementation/?utm_campaign=organic_social&utm_content=&utm_medium=social&utm_source=bluesky&utm_term=bandcamp

item.title: Fellow '120 Minutes' hosts Matt Pinfield and Jim Shearer fon…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
Fellow '120 Minutes' hosts Matt Pinfield and Jim Shearer fondly remember Dave Kendall, the creator and host of the hugely influential MTV show who has died.

Access the free article here: www.rollingstone.com/music/music-...
item.content:encoded:
Fellow '120 Minutes' hosts Matt Pinfield and Jim Shearer fondly remember Dave Kendall, the creator and host of the hugely influential MTV show who has died.

Access the free article here: www.rollingstone.com/music/music-...

item.title: The Odyssey feels like a prism through which Nolan's earlier…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The Odyssey feels like a prism through which Nolan's earlier films can be understood. A downbeat realist by nature, Nolan imbues the epic with a fascinating tension between fantasy and skepticism. n.pr/44RTySN
item.content:encoded: The Odyssey feels like a prism through which Nolan's earlier films can be understood. A downbeat realist by nature, Nolan imbues the epic with a fascinating tension between fantasy and skepticism. n.pr/44RTySN

item.title: At the launch party for his new web series, the Academy Awar…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
At the launch party for his new web series, the Academy Award-winning musician, filmmaker, and producer built on a long-running social experiment: bringing strangers together over a shared game and seeing what happens next.

Read: www.rollingstone.com/music/music-...
item.content:encoded:
At the launch party for his new web series, the Academy Award-winning musician, filmmaker, and producer built on a long-running social experiment: bringing strangers together over a shared game and seeing what happens next.

Read: www.rollingstone.com/music/music-...

item.title: The right is using Todd Blanche's confirmation hearing to ar…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
The right is using Todd Blanche's confirmation hearing to argue that mifepristone is the problem, when it's criminal abusers who are actually at fault.

Commentary: www.rollingstone.com/politics/pol...
item.content:encoded:
The right is using Todd Blanche's confirmation hearing to argue that mifepristone is the problem, when it's criminal abusers who are actually at fault.

Commentary: www.rollingstone.com/politics/pol...

item.title: Kesha headlined Festival d’été de Québec last night, perform…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description:
Kesha headlined Festival d’été de Québec last night, performing for a massive crowd on the historic Plains of Abraham. She opened with “TiK ToK,” her 2009 ode to dental hygiene.

[📷: Stéphane Bourgeois, 🎙️: Las Culturistas]
item.content:encoded:
Kesha headlined Festival d’été de Québec last night, performing for a massive crowd on the historic Plains of Abraham. She opened with “TiK ToK,” her 2009 ode to dental hygiene.

[📷: Stéphane Bourgeois, 🎙️: Las Culturistas]

item.title: Jennifer Novak's first year of college was hard: living in a…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Jennifer Novak's first year of college was hard: living in a new city, enmeshed in an abusive relationship and struggling with school. Things came to a head when she got a breakup text in class. n.pr/4aZrdNM
item.content:encoded: Jennifer Novak's first year of college was hard: living in a new city, enmeshed in an abusive relationship and struggling with school. Things came to a head when she got a breakup text in class. n.pr/4aZrdNM

item.title: The Trump administration wants to install permanent fencing …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The Trump administration wants to install permanent fencing around Lafayette Park, directly outside the White House. It's long been a popular spot for protesters, who worry barriers will change that. n.pr/3RiihMz
item.content:encoded: The Trump administration wants to install permanent fencing around Lafayette Park, directly outside the White House. It's long been a popular spot for protesters, who worry barriers will change that. n.pr/3RiihMz

item.title: Higher oil prices since the Iran war began mean many oil com…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Higher oil prices since the Iran war began mean many oil companies have brought in excess profits. Some U.S. lawmakers want to tax those windfall profits and give the money to lower-income Americans. n.pr/4fimkk9
item.content:encoded: Higher oil prices since the Iran war began mean many oil companies have brought in excess profits. Some U.S. lawmakers want to tax those windfall profits and give the money to lower-income Americans. n.pr/4fimkk9

item.title: In their new book, photographers Cheyenne Clementi and Valen…
item.author: DJ Mag (@djmag.com)
item.description:
In their new book, photographers Cheyenne Clementi and Valentina Morandi collect over 160 images that document their formative years in Europe’s free-party scene, and the familial sense of community with in it

@danieldylanwray.bsky.social spoke to them about 10 key shots

djmag.com/never-alone-...
item.content:encoded:
In their new book, photographers Cheyenne Clementi and Valentina Morandi collect over 160 images that document their formative years in Europe’s free-party scene, and the familial sense of community with in it

@danieldylanwray.bsky.social spoke to them about 10 key shots

djmag.com/never-alone-...

item.title: The political implications the war in Iran is having on the …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The political implications the war in Iran is having on the GOP. And, a new report has found that ICE officers' use of force is not rare since President Trump took office for his second term. n.pr/4f4YXM7
item.content:encoded: The political implications the war in Iran is having on the GOP. And, a new report has found that ICE officers' use of force is not rare since President Trump took office for his second term. n.pr/4f4YXM7

item.title: SixTONES 新MVはロードムービー仕立て 舞台はクロアチア🇭🇷 🔗https://natalie.mu…
item.author: 音楽ナタリー (@music.natalie.mu)
item.description:
